title: draba physocarpa
intro: Draba physocarpa, also known as bladder draba or bladder draba mustard, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Draba physocarpa include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and support the immune system. Draba physocarpa can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to the skin.
